title: TryHard
body:
Everyone wants little bit hardcore minecraft experince right?

It is a brutal world, filled with unknown lands open to endless exploration.

Things to know before the things you will encounter in the game;

- Items only stack up to 5

- [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)

- [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration), four seasons, spoiling food and changes of temperature

and lots of new mobs, biomes, realistic terrain.




Minimum 6GB ram is recommended.

for contact, discord: necm23
